category_title: Older preschool children expressing specific verbal and emotional concerns about transition
scenario_title: Questioning continuity when observing moving trucks
minimal_context: The student is standing outdoors near the fence observing moving trucks and estimating how many toys can fit inside.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Look at the moving trucks coming to move the building next door. How many toys do you think can fit on one truck?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: That is a lot of toys. Those trucks and movers will move out our things in the next few weeks.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Will we have the same teachers?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We will have to wait and see.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: But will the new school have a backyard? What is going to happen to our playground after we move?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Look at the moving trucks coming to move the building next door. How many toys do you think can fit on one truck?

STUDENT: 600! Or maybe 1000!

TUTOR: That is a lot of toys. Those trucks and movers will move out our things in the next few weeks.

STUDENT: Will we have the same teachers?

TUTOR: We will have to wait and see.

STUDENT: But will the new school have a backyard? What is going to happen to our playground after we move?

task.content: Observing moving trucks coming to move the building next door and estimating how many toys can fit on one truck

context.time_context: Next few weeks before the move

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher connects the neighbor's move to the preschool move by noting that these trucks and movers will move out their things in the next few weeks
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: One boy asks, 'Will we have the same teachers?' Another boy asks if the new school 'will have a backyard.'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Concerns about what would happen to it after their move
related_quotes: Will we have the same teachers?

behavior_patterns.condition: When discussing the playground, which was the children's favorite space
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Often asked questions about what would happen to it after their move
